chunks.text: In Memoriam - EECS at Berkeley. Members of the EECS faculty we have lost since 1980. Leonard James Black (1904-1980) EE B.S. 1928/M.S. 1930/Ph.D. 1936. David John Sakrison (1933-1980). John Robert Woodyard (1904-1981). Lester Edwin Reukema (1891-1982) EE B.S. 1922/M.S. 1924/Ph.D. 1926. Charles Francis Dalziel (1904-1986) EE B.S. 1927/M.S. 1932/Ph.D. 1935. Herbert Jefferson Scott (1897-1988). Shyh Wang (1925-1992). Eugene Leighton 'Gene' Lawler (1933-1994). Paul Lester Morton (1906-1995) EE Ph.D. 1943.

Diogenes James 'Dodge' Angelakos (1919-1997). Arthur McMurrin 'Mac' Hopkin (1919-2000). Charles Susskind (1921-2004). Donald Oscar Pederson (1925-2005). Arthur Richard 'Richard' Newton (1951-2007) EECS Ph.D. 1978. John Roy Whinnery (1916-2009) EE B.S. 1937/Ph.D. 1948. Otto Joseph Mitchell Smith (1917-2009). Charles Auguste Desoer (1926-2010). Jerrold Eldon 'Jerry' Marsden (1942-2010).

Charles Kennedy 'Ned' Birdsall (1925-2012). Robert Wilensky (1951-2013). Ivan Paul Kaminow (1930-2013). George Lewis Turin (1930-2014). Aram John Thomasian (1924-2013) Statistics Ph.D. 1954. Arthur R. 'Art' Bergen (1923-2014). Howard Martin 'Marty' Graham (1926-2015). Ernest Shiu-Jen 'Ernie' Kuh (1928-2015). Chittoor Vijayaraghavalu 'Ram' Ramamoorthy (1926-2016) ME M.S. 1951/Ph.D. 1953.

Nathan Woontong Cheung (1950-2016). Harry Douglas Huskey (1916-2017). Kenneth Kwai-Hsiang Mei (1932-2017). Lotfi Zadeh (1921-2017). Jean Paul Jacob (1937-2019). Elwyn Berlekamp (1940-2019). Jerome Ralph 'Jay' Singer (1921-2019). Justin Douglas 'Doug' Tygar (1962-2020) Math/CS B.A. 1982. Arthur Gill (1930-2020) EE Ph.D. 1959. Richard Manning 'Dick' White (1930-2020).

Pravin Pratap Varaiya (1940-2022) EECS Ph.D. 1966. David Albert Hodges (1937-2022) M.S. 1961/Ph.D. 1966. Allen Joseph Lichtenberg (1930-2023). Theodore Van Duzer (1927-2023) Ph.D. 1960. Robert Brodersen (1945-2024). William J. Welch (1934-2024). Michael J. Clancy (1950-2024). Robert K. Brayton (1934-2025). Michael A. Harrison (1936-2025). Andrew R. Neureuther (1941-2025). Beresford N. Parlett (1932-2026).
